code: import React,{useState}from'react';import'./bmicalculator.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const BMICalculator=()=>{const[weight,setWeight]=useState('');const[height,setHeight]=useState('');const[bmi,setBMI]=useState(null);const[message,setMessage]=useState('');const calculateBMI=e=>{e.preventDefault();if(weight>0&&height>0){const heightInMeters=height/100;const bmiValue=(weight/(heightInMeters*heightInMeters)).toFixed(2);setBMI(bmiValue);if(bmiValue<18.5){setMessage('You are underweight.');}else if(bmiValue>=18.5&&bmiValue<24.9){setMessage('You have a normal weight.');}else if(bmiValue>=25&&bmiValue<29.9){setMessage('You are overweight.');}else{setMessage('You are obese.');}}else{setMessage('Please enter valid weight and height.');}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"bmi-calculator",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"background"})," ",/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"calculator-content",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"calculator-text",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"This is a message as a second heder for calculator quote"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Pariatur modi ipsam voluptate exercitationem eum perferendis sed expedita odio quasi dolorum libero aut, reiciendis, iusto velit molestiae repellat dolor nostrum nam?"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"calculator-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Calculate Your BMI"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Find out your Body Mass Index and take the first step towards a healthier you!"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:calculateBMI,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"input-group",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{htmlFor:"weight",children:"Weight (kg):"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"number",id:"weight",value:weight,onChange:e=>setWeight(e.target.value),placeholder:"Enter your weight"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"input-group",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{htmlFor:"height",children:"Height (cm):"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"number",id:"height",value:height,onChange:e=>setHeight(e.target.value),placeholder:"Enter your height"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",children:"Calculate BMI"})]}),bmi&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"result",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h2",{children:["Your BMI: ",bmi]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:message})]})]})]})]});};export default BMICalculator;
